description: S4D-Lin complex + ZOH + pre-norm (all at once)
dt init [0.001,0.1] only (too small for random A)
HiPPO A init only (dt=1.0 kills most states)
d=384 n_layers=6 (more depth underfits at 1000 steps)
lr=3e-4 (too slow to converge in 1000 steps)
output proj scaling + grad clip (hurts at L=4)
